Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.types

Class ChzzkLiveInfo

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.types.ChzzkLiveInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
LiveInfo
Direct Known Subclasses:

public class ChzzkLiveInfo extends Object implements LiveInfo
Class representing live status information.
